sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of FT Vest Gold Strategy Quarterly Buffer ETF (CBOE:BGLD)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the FT Vest Gold Strategy Quarterly Buffer ETF (CBOE:BGLD), summarizing various indicators and moving averages. It highlights a "sell" signal for BGLD based on current market conditions and technical ratings. The article also includes frequently asked questions about technical analysis concepts like oscillators, pivots, and moving averages.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE: GL) EVP gets stock awards and tax share withholding
feed.summary: Rebecca E. Zorn, EVP & Chief Talent Officer at Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL), reported receiving an employee stock option for 8,500 shares and additional stock awards totaling 7,463 shares. To cover tax obligations, 2,610 shares were disposed of through withholding at $144.15 per share. Following these transactions, Zorn directly owns 16,965.0997 common shares and 8,500 options.

feed.title: Today's Analyst Rating Update on Incyte (INCY): Evercore ISI Gro
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has raised its price target for Incyte (INCY) from $73.00 to $110.00, while maintaining an 'In-Line' rating. This adjustment reflects a 50.68% increase from the prior target. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for Incyte, with the consensus average target price across 22 analysts being $107.17, suggesting an 8.41% upside from the current price.

feed.title: EXC: Evercore ISI Group Raises Price Target for Exelon to $58 |
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has raised its price target for Exelon (EXC) to $58 from $55, maintaining an "Outperform" rating. This decision aligns with a trend of increasing price targets from other analysts, reflecting continued confidence in the company which serves approximately 10 million power and gas customers. Despite the positive analyst sentiment, GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) for Exelon to be lower than its current trading price, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) Price Target Raised by Evercore ISI Gro
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has increased its price target for CenterPoint Energy (CNP) from $42.00 to $44.00, while maintaining an "In-Line" rating. This adjustment reflects continued analyst attention, with other firms like Keybanc and Wells Fargo also raising their price targets recently. Despite the average analyst target suggesting a slight upside, GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value fair value calculation.

feed.title: Starbucks (SBUX) Analyst Rating: Guggenheim Raises Price Target to $95 | SBUX Stock News
feed.summary: Guggenheim analyst Gregory Francfort maintained a Neutral rating on Starbucks (SBUX) and raised the price target from $90 to $95. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook amidst changing market conditions. Other analysts have also recently issued varying ratings and price targets for Starbucks, with the average target from 33 analysts being $100.39, implying a 3.33% upside from the current price, and the average brokerage recommendation being "Outperform."

feed.title: Build-A-Bear Workshop (NYSE:BBW) Raised to "Hold" at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Build-A-Bear Workshop (NYSE:BBW) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating, following several other analysts maintaining "buy" ratings and adjusting price targets. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings. Build-A-Bear Workshop currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with an average price target of $64.75.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) Now Covered by Sanford C. Bernstein
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein has initiated coverage on American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a "market perform" rating and a $205.00 price target. This suggests a potential upside of 7.48% from the current price. The report also details recent analyst ratings from other firms, insider trading activity, institutional investor movements, and the company's latest financial performance.

feed.title: American International Group (NYSE:AIG) Raised to "Buy" at The Goldman Sachs Group
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has upgraded American International Group (NYSE:AIG) from a "neutral" to a "buy" rating, setting a new price target of $90.00, which suggests a 13.07% upside. This upgrade comes amidst other analyst revisions, with the company currently holding a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $87.95 from various firms. AIG recently reported quarterly earnings of $1.96 per share, surpassing analyst estimates, and institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings in the company.

feed.title: Dow Falls Over 300 Points; Kroger Posts Mixed Results
feed.summary: U.S. stocks, including the Dow Jones, NASDAQ, and S&P 500, experienced declines on Thursday morning. Kroger Co. reported mixed fourth-quarter results, beating EPS estimates but missing on sales, and provided FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance slightly below analyst expectations. The article also highlights leading and lagging sectors, commodity prices, and individual stock movements including significant gains for Impact BioMedical Inc. and Blue Hat Interactive Entertainment Technology, and drops for Medicus Pharma Ltd. and FTC Solar Inc.

feed.title: Prologis details plans for data center campus outside Cincinnati, Ohio
feed.summary: Prologis has outlined detailed plans for "Project Mila," a data center campus near Cincinnati, Ohio, which will include four 220,000 sq ft buildings and an on-site substation. The company acquired 141 acres for $7.7 million and plans to begin construction on the first building later this year, with all four expected to be complete by 2029. Prologis, a major industrial real estate firm, is expanding its data center presence globally, targeting up to 10GW of capacity over the next decade.

feed.title: The Home Depot to Launch Real-Time Delivery Tracker for Pro Customers
feed.summary: The Home Depot is set to launch the industry's first real-time delivery tracker for large materials for its pro customers by the end of Q1 2026. This feature, available on their app and website, will provide minute-by-minute updates, truck route visibility, and estimated delivery times using GPS data from delivery trucks. The initiative aims to enhance transparency and efficiency for pro customers on busy job sites.

feed.title: NCR Atleos Seeks Noteholder Consents for Brink’s Merger
feed.summary: NCR Atleos is seeking consent from holders of its 9.500% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 to amend the indenture, preventing its planned merger with The Brink's Company from triggering a Change of Control event. Noteholders who agree by March 11, 2026, and don't revoke their consent, will receive a cash payment of $1.25 per $1,000 principal, provided a majority consents and the merger closes. The company, which operates in the financial self-service and ATM industry, currently has a "Hold" analyst rating with a $50.40 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" rates it as Outperform due to improving financials and strong technical momentum.

feed.title: Short Interest Eases For Air Products As Risks And Rewards Rebalance
feed.summary: Short interest in Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE:APD) has decreased by 9.69%, indicating that fewer investors are betting against the stock. This shift suggests a rebalance in risk and reward expectations, potentially reflecting easing concerns about the company's long-term projects despite ongoing risks related to dividend coverage and balance sheet pressure. Investors are advised to consider this sentiment alongside APD's fundamentals, project pipeline, and analyst outlook.

feed.title: Adam Schechter Sells 8,705 Shares of Labcorp (NYSE:LH) Stock
feed.summary: Adam Schechter, CEO of Labcorp (NYSE:LH), sold 8,705 shares of the company's stock for approximately $2.44 million on March 3rd, reducing his ownership by 9.73%. This transaction follows Labcorp's recent quarterly earnings report where they beat EPS estimates and provided strong FY2026 guidance. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $304.82, and the company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.72 per share.

feed.title: FAF Stock Near 52-Week High: A Signal for Investors to Hold Tight?
feed.summary: First American Financial Corporation (FAF) closed near its 52-week high, signaling strong investor confidence and potential for further appreciation. The company has a solid track record of beating earnings estimates, boasts favorable valuation metrics, and is projected for strong growth in earnings and revenues. Key drivers include increased demand from millennials, improving economic conditions, and strategic investments in technology and product offerings.

feed.title: Shareholder sues Chubb for blocking climate loss subrogation proposal
feed.summary: Chubb Limited is facing a federal lawsuit initiated by shareholder representative As You Sow, after the insurer moved to block a proposal concerning the recovery of climate-related losses through subrogation. The lawsuit, filed in the US District Court for the District of Columbia, challenges Chubb's attempt to exclude the proposal from its 2026 proxy materials, arguing that it's unlawful under the Securities Exchange Act. The case highlights the growing challenges insurers face in pricing and underwriting coverage amidst escalating climate risks.

feed.title: This obscure legal clause is holding back US malls. Simon Property Group got Saks Global to forfeit it.
feed.summary: Simon Property Group leveraged a $100 million investment offer into Saks Global to get the luxury department store company to forfeit reciprocal easement agreements (REAs) at nearly 60 of its malls. These REAs are legal clauses that have historically granted anchor tenants veto power over mall renovations and changes, hindering modernization efforts. Although Saks Global has since filed for bankruptcy and the investment is largely lost, Simon's CEO views it as a strategic win, allowing the REIT to move forward with property development without needing anchor tenant approval.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Corp (HRL, US4404521020) navigates margin pressures and global protein demand in 2026
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corp (HRL) is positioned as a defensive, dividend-focused holding for 2026, balancing margin pressures with global protein and convenience food demand. The company is sensitive to consumer spending, commodity cycles, and Federal Reserve policy, making it a stable cash flow story rather than a high-growth play. HRL is managing cost pressures, innovating in products, and reshaping its portfolio to focus on branded, value-added categories, maintaining a conservative balance sheet and a long history of dividend increases.

feed.title: CORRECTION - Blink Charging Teams with Korian to Offer Expanded EV Infrastructure Throughout Belgium
feed.summary: Blink Charging and Korian Belgium are partnering for a nationwide EV charging rollout in Belgium, planning over 200 Blink-owned chargers across 90 Korian locations by the end of 2026. Blink will fully finance, install, and maintain the infrastructure, providing Korian sites with recurring income and no upfront costs. This initiative aims to serve employees, residents, visitors, and the public, with a similar expansion planned for the Netherlands.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) Cut to "Hold" at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research downgraded Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) from "strong-buy" to "hold". Other analysts have also issued varied ratings, resulting in an average "Hold" rating and a $119.00 price target. The company recently beat EPS expectations but slightly missed revenue, and an insider sold a significant number of shares.

feed.title: Corning Stock Is Falling. Why Broadcom Could Be Blamed.
feed.summary: Corning's stock fell after Broadcom's CEO expressed a dim view on the immediate prospects of optical networking in AI data centers. This technology has been a key factor in Corning's appeal to investors, who are looking for a swift shift from copper to fiber in data-center networking. Broadcom's comments suggest a slower transition, impacting Corning's stock performance.

feed.title: Independent Proxy Advisory Firms, Including ISS, Recommend Bitfarms Shareholders Vote FOR U.S. Redomiciliation
feed.summary: Independent proxy advisory firms, including ISS, have recommended that Bitfarms shareholders vote FOR the company's proposed U.S. redomiciliation. This move aims to enhance access to U.S. capital, enable potential inclusion in additional indices, and mitigate regulatory risks. Bitfarms' CEO, Ben Gagnon, highlighted the strategic benefits of this transition as the company evolves into Keel Infrastructure, a North American digital infrastructure and energy company.

feed.title: Buy 5 Computers IT Services Stocks to Boost Your Portfolio in 2026
feed.summary: The Computers IT Services industry is thriving due to global digitization, with robust spending in areas like cloud, AI, and cybersecurity. This article identifies five top-ranked stocks within this sector—Vertiv Holdings Co. (VRT), Jack Henry & Associates Inc. (JKHY), SoundHound AI Inc. (SOUN), Accenture plc (ACN), and Genpact Ltd. (G)—that are poised for significant growth in 2026. Each company leverages specific strengths, from AI integration and product innovation to strategic acquisitions and strong market demand, making them attractive investments.

feed.title: Western Digital vs Seagate After the Sell-Off: One Storage Rival Is a Clear Winner
feed.summary: Following a recent market sell-off affecting both Western Digital (WDC) and Seagate Technology (STX), an analysis compares the two storage rivals for retirement-focused investors. Western Digital is highlighted as the stronger risk-adjusted investment due to its faster growth, solid balance sheet, and sold-out HDD capacity through 2028, despite Seagate's higher dividend yield. Seagate presents higher balance sheet risk and questions around its CEO's recent sell transactions.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Vast Raises $500 Million to Boost its Haven Space Stations
feed.summary: Vast has successfully raised $500 million in new funding to accelerate the production of its Haven space stations. This announcement comes as the NYSE reports choppy trading due to ongoing geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices. Meanwhile, Pentair celebrates its 30th anniversary of listing on the NYSE.

feed.title: Alliance for Genomic Discovery expands with Regeneron Genetics Center membership and new proteomics data offering
feed.summary: The Alliance for Genomic Discovery (AGD) has expanded its membership with Regeneron Genetics Center (RGC), increasing its core dataset to 312,000 whole genomes. Additionally, the AGD announced a new initiative to create a dataset of 50,000 whole genomes paired with proteomic data, with GSK as one of the first participants. These advancements aim to accelerate drug discovery and develop new treatments by integrating extensive genomic and clinical data with advanced AI and multiomic insights.

feed.title: Snyder Capital Management L P Cuts Stake in IDEX Corporation $IEX
feed.summary: Snyder Capital Management L P reduced its stake in IDEX Corporation by 1.6% in the third quarter, now holding 489,700 shares valued at approximately $79.7 million. Despite this reduction, IDEX maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $228.22, following strong quarterly earnings and optimistic full-year guidance. Institutional investors collectively own a significant 97.96% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Argus Research Adjusts Price Target on Edison International to $85 From $65, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Argus Research has increased its price target for Edison International (EIX) to $85 from $65, while simultaneously reaffirming a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from Argus Research regarding the utility company's prospects. Several other analysts have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for Edison International, indicating ongoing evaluation of the company's performance.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Prudential Financial PT to $105 From $113, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has revised its price target for Prudential Financial (PRU) to $105 from $113, while maintaining a "Hold" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a recent analyst action concerning the life and health insurance provider. The article also notes other recent analyst rating changes for Prudential Financial from firms like Wells Fargo, Argus Research, JPMorgan, Mizuho, Jefferies, Piper Sandler, and Evercore ISI.

feed.title: How Is Newmont's Stock Performance Compared to Other Gold Miners’ Stocks?
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NEM), a large-cap gold mining company, has shown mixed stock performance compared to the VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) and its rival Agnico Eagle Mines Limited (AEM). While NEM has outperformed GDX over the past three months and 52 weeks, it lags GDX year-to-date and has trailed AEM in YTD performance. Despite recent declines due to drops in precious metal prices, analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for NEM with a significant premium target price.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Incyte to $110 From $73, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ: INCY) shares to $110 from $73, while maintaining an "In Line" rating. This adjustment reflects a significant uplift in the analyst's valuation of the pharmaceutical company, which specializes in cancer and inflammatory disorder treatments.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Consolidated Edison to $117 From $106, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has raised its price target for Consolidated Edison (ED) to $117 from $106, while keeping an "In Line" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a modified outlook for the utility company. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments to Consolidated Edison's price target and rating.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on CenterPoint Energy to $44 From $42, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for CenterPoint Energy (NYSE: CNP) to $44 from $42, while reiterating an "In Line" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the analyst firm for the utility company. CenterPoint Energy specializes in natural gas and electricity distribution, with recent financial activities including an offering of general mortgage bonds and convertible notes.

feed.title: AXON Stock Surged 25% Last Week: Analysts See 232% More Upside
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise (AXON) stock surged 25% last week, driven by strong Q4 earnings, accelerating bookings growth, and a significant structural shift towards software and services. Analysts project a potential 232% upside, with a mean price target of $735.0, as the company's AI Era Plan and recent acquisitions are expected to significantly expand its market and revenue. Despite tariff-driven gross margin compression being a risk, Axon is positioned for continued growth with new product launches and expanding premium plans.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Names Gloria Anderson as the Next Headliner for Life Out Here
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company announced Gloria Anderson from Luling, Texas, as the winner of its Life Out Here Emerging Artist Program. Anderson's original song "A Little Bit of Cowboy" was selected from thousands of submissions, embodying the spirit of hard work and persistence. As the winner, Anderson will receive a unique Nashville experience, including mentorship and recording opportunities, reinforcing Tractor Supply's commitment to supporting rural culture and emerging country music talent.

feed.title: CVS taps Google Cloud to roll out AI-powered health platform
feed.summary: CVS Health is partnering with Google Cloud to launch Health100, an AI-powered health platform scheduled for initial rollout in 2026. This platform aims to integrate data from various sources to provide customers with real-time health management assistance and offer faster care options with reduced out-of-pocket spending. Health100 will utilize agentic AI and Google Cloud's AI technologies to create a consumer-centric system connecting pharmacies, providers, and digital health systems.

feed.title: HPE’s CFO Marie Myers aims to transform finance operations via AI
feed.summary: HPE CFO Marie Myers is leading a transformation of finance operations using AI, collaborating with Deloitte to develop "CFO Insights" which leverages agentic and generative AI to shift focus from retrospective analysis to forward-looking intelligence. Myers emphasizes the critical need for CFOs to be AI-literate and active architects of AI transformation within their companies, highlighting its application in operational reviews and the significant challenge of upskilling the workforce to ensure responsible and accurate AI implementation. She believes the finance industry is still in the very early stages of experiencing AI's full transformative impact.

feed.title: General Mills completes removal of certified colors from school foods
feed.summary: General Mills announced that it has completed the removal of certified colors from its entire portfolio of K-12 school foods, achieving this goal ahead of its summer 2026 commitment. This milestone was reached by reformulating Lucky Charms 25% Less Sugar Cereal, making 100% of its K-12 school food products free of certified colors. The company has further commitments to remove certified colors from its U.S. cereal portfolio by summer 2026 and its complete U.S. retail portfolio by the end of 2027.

feed.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: BJ’s Wholesale Club and The Toro Company
feed.summary: BJ’s Wholesale Club and The Toro Company recently released their quarterly earnings reports, showcasing varied performances. BJ's Wholesale Club exceeded EPS expectations but missed on revenue, driven by strong membership growth and digital sales. The Toro Company, conversely, surpassed expectations with increased diluted EPS and net sales, primarily due to strong demand in its Professional segment. Both companies have positive outlooks for fiscal 2026, with plans for continued investment and strategic growth despite dynamic market conditions.

feed.title: Regions Bank Named 2026 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award Winner
feed.summary: Regions Bank has been recognized with the 2026 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award for its strong employee engagement and outstanding workplace culture. This marks the 12th consecutive year the company has received this prestigious award. The recognition highlights Regions' commitment to creating an environment where its 20,000 associates feel valued and can thrive, which in turn supports excellent customer and community service.

feed.title: Evercore ISI upgrades Southern stock rating on growth outlook
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has upgraded Southern Co. (NYSE:SO) to Outperform from In Line and increased its price target to $111 from $103, driven by the utility company's strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 adjusted earnings and optimistic 2026 guidance. The firm cited Southern's favorable regulatory environment, economic development, and investment opportunities as key factors supporting its projected 8% adjusted EPS growth through 2030. This upgrade aligns with recent positive movements from other analysts like KeyBanc, Jefferies, and BMO Capital, which have also raised their ratings or price targets for Southern Co.

feed.title: Talos Eurisko Asset Management LP Sells 87,400 Shares of Microchip Technology Incorporated $MCHP
feed.summary: Talos Eurisko Asset Management LP recently reduced its stake in Microchip Technology Incorporated (MCHP) by 23.7%, selling 87,400 shares, now owning 281,700 shares valued at $18,091,000. Other hedge funds have also adjusted their positions, and 91.51% of the stock is institutionally owned. Wall Street analysts currently give MCHP a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $86.00, while the company also announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Snyder Capital Management L P Has $36.25 Million Holdings in Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS
feed.summary: Snyder Capital Management L P has slightly reduced its stake in Keysight Technologies Inc. by 1.8%, now holding 207,260 shares valued at approximately $36.25 million. Keysight Technologies recently reported strong quarterly results, beating analyst expectations, and authorized a $1.5 billion share buyback program. Despite some insider selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $295.36.

feed.title: Hubbell finance chief at JPMorgan industrials event, webcast for investors
feed.summary: Hubbell (NYSE: HUBB) announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Joe Capozzoli, will participate in the JP Morgan Industrials Conference on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, at 12:15 PM ET. The event will be webcast live, and the audio will be accessible through Hubbell's Investor Relations section of their website. The audio will also be archived for 24 hours after the event.

feed.title: School cafeterias drop certified colors as General Mills hits K-12 goal early
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE: GIS) has announced that all of its K-12 school food products are now made without certified colors, achieving this goal ahead of its summer 2026 commitment. This initiative highlights the company's commitment to product innovation, safety, and quality in foodservice. General Mills also stated its plans to remove certified colors from its entire U.S. cereal portfolio by summer 2026 and its full U.S. retail portfolio by the end of 2027.

feed.title: GE HealthCare tops FDA AI list, brings imaging and ultrasound to HIMSS 2026
feed.summary: GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) is set to showcase its latest AI-powered, cloud-first, and software solutions at HIMSS 2026, aiming to streamline healthcare operations and improve patient care amidst ongoing workforce shortages. The company leads the industry in FDA AI-enabled medical device authorizations and will highlight innovations like CareIntellect for Perinatal, Command Center, Genesis Radiology Workspace, Imaging 360, Verisound Digital and AI Ultrasound Solutions, and Vscan Air Enterprise Solutions. These technologies focus on enabling efficient data access, enhancing workflows, and supporting clinical decision-making.

feed.title: Stonebridge Capital Advisors LLC Sells 9,029 Shares of Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD
feed.summary: Stonebridge Capital Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Gilead Sciences by 6.5% in the third quarter, selling 9,029 shares. Despite this, other institutions like Norges Bank, Ameriprise Financial Inc., Invesco Ltd., Assenagon Asset Management S.A., and Vanguard Group Inc. significantly increased their holdings. The biopharmaceutical company also saw insider selling from its Director and CEO, but analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $156.72 and the company raised its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase Energy made misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate the effects of the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, leading to an overstatement of its financial and operational prospects. Investors are encouraged to contact the law firm by April 20, 2026, to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: New TI–NVIDIA project aims to make humanoid robots safer in crowds
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) and NVIDIA are partnering to enhance the safe deployment of humanoid robots by integrating TI's motor control, mmWave radar sensing, and power technologies with NVIDIA Jetson Thor and Holoscan. This collaboration focuses on enabling advanced 3D perception and safety awareness in challenging environments, allowing robots to transition from simulation to production-ready, safety-capable operation. TI will demonstrate their joint solution at NVIDIA GTC, scheduled for March 16–19, 2026.
